title: montia fontana subsp. minor
intro: Montia fontana subsp. minor, also known as spring beauty or creeping montia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Montiaceae. It is a low-growing, spreading plant with oval-shaped leaves and delicate white or pink flowers. Montia fontana subsp. minor has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
